name: Garen

resource.context_notes: Champion does not use mana/energy as a standard regenerating resource for ability costs.

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Perseverance
passive.description_source: Innate:  Garen continually  regenerates a portion of his  maximum health.

effects.description: Innate: Garen regenerates an additional[ 1.5% : 10.9% (based on level) of his maximum health every 5 seconds. ][ 0.15% : 1.09% (based on level) of his maximum health every 0.5 seconds. ]

Perseverance is lost for 8 seconds if Garen takes damage from champions, epic monsters, or turrets, or if he is hit by an enemy ability or affected by an enemy summoner spell, refreshing on subsequent damage and hits taken from them.

passive.description: Innate: Garen regenerates an additional[ 1.5% : 10.9% (based on level) of his maximum health every 5 seconds. ][ 0.15% : 1.09% (based on level) of his maximum health every 0.5 seconds. ]
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Perseverance does not go on nor refresh its cooldown from damage which was fully prevented by a shield or invulnerability.

basic_ability_1.name: Decisive Strike
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Garen gains  bonus movement speed and  cleanses from  slows.

effects.context_notes: Active: Garen cleanses himself of all slows and gains 35% bonus movement speed for a duration.
Additionally, Garen empowers his next basic attack within 4.

effects.description: Decisive Strike resets Garen's basic attack timer.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Garen cleanses himself of all slows and gains 35% bonus movement speed for a duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The enhanced attack will apply other on-hit effects and can critically strike as normal (the bonus damage does not).

basic_ability_2.name: Courage
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Garen permanently gains bonus  armor and  magic resist by killing enemies, up to a cap. Upon reaching the cap, he gains another permanent boost to these defenses.

effects.description: Passive: Whenever Garen kills an enemy, he generates a stack of Courage, stacking up to 150 times.
Courage: For each stack, Garen gains 0.2 bonus armor and 0.2 bonus magic resistance, up to a maximum of 30 bonus resistances each.

effects.context_notes: Active: Garen reduces incoming damage for 4 seconds.
Active: Garen reduces incoming damage for 4 seconds.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive: Whenever Garen kills an enemy, he generates a stack of Courage, stacking up to 150 times.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Courage's bonus resistances are only gained when it is ranked up at least once, but Courage's passive is retroactive for units killed before it was learned.

basic_ability_3.name: Judgment
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Garen rapidly spins with his sword for a short time while  ghosted, continually dealing physical damage to nearby enemies. He spins more based on his  bonus attack speed.

effects.context_notes: Active: Garen rapidly spins his sword around himself 7 (+ 1 per 25% bonus attack speed) times over 3 seconds, becoming unable to declare basic attacks but gaining ghosting and dealing physical damage to nearby enemies periodically.

effects.description: Enemy champions hit 6 times by Judgment are inflicted with 25% armor reduction for 6 seconds, with the duration refreshing upon the 7th hit and every 6th hit thereafter.

effects.context_notes: Judgment deals 25% increased damage against the nearest enemy hit.

effects.description: Judgment can critically strike for[ (130% + 9%) damage. ][ 30% bonus critical damage. ]

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Garen rapidly spins his sword around himself 7 (+ 1 per 25% bonus attack speed) times over 3 seconds, becoming unable to declare basic attacks but gaining ghosting and dealing physical damage to nearby enemies periodically. Judgment can be recast after 1 second while active, and does so automatically after it ends.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): At level 20, Garen will spin a minimum of 9 times.

ultimate.name: Demacian Justice
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Garen strikes a lethal blow to an enemy champion that deals true damage based on the target's missing health.

effects.context_notes: Active: Garen calls upon the might of Demacia onto the target enemy champion, dealing them true damage as well as revealing them for 1 second at the start of the cast time.

ultimate.description: Active: Garen calls upon the might of Demacia onto the target enemy champion, dealing them true damage as well as revealing them for 1 second at the start of the cast time.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The target will die if they're at least under 20 / 21.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
